privileged_info_summary: Verified that the expected disclaimer text ('unauthorized help on this exam') and expected quit text ('action cannot be undone') match the substrings specified in the task description and the anti-gaming database queries in setup_task.sh. The exam data configuration is synthetically managed via Python scripts interacting with the SEB Server MariaDB container.
